name: ITS2_Basidiomycota
description: Fungal ITS2 region in Basidiomycota. Approximate consensus length ~230 bp (highly variable: 80-700 bp across the fungal kingdom). Mushroom-forming fungi + smuts/rusts. The fungal barcode-of-choice (Schoch 2012). Allow high mismatch — real biological variability is the signal.
